summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EVO (Elternvereinigung Oberglatt) website including backend APIs, frontend UI, and full integration testing. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, booking system, content management, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Backend API health checks (20/20 endpoints working)
Board members, events, and blog content loading
Robihütte pricing logic (4h: CHF 80 member/CHF 120 external, 24h: CHF 150-200 member/CHF 230-350 external)
Contact form submission and newsletter subscription
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Mission, Events, Robihütte teaser, Team, CTA)
Navigation works across all pages (Start, Über uns, Aktuell, Robihütte, Blog, Kontakt)
Robihütte booking system 3-step flow (Date/Time → Event Details → Summary)
Booking availability checks and price calculations
Cleaning addon pricing (CHF 60) and deposit handling (CHF 250)
Footer links and legal pages (Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB)
Complete user journey from homepage to booking completion
